priority.full_text:
NVIDIA’s DLSS upscaling technology is now supported by the open-source NVK Vulkan driver for Linux, which is good news for Linux gamers.

The feature was added in Mesa 26.2 and lets supported Vulkan games use DLSS. This update allows the open-source NVK driver to work with https://t.co/a0SGlm6VJ7
priority.summary: NVIDIA DLSS上采样技术现已支持开源NVK Vulkan驱动（Linux）。Mesa 26.2更新让Linux游戏支持DLSS。
angles: DLSS登陆Linux：开源驱动重大突破
Mesa 26.2更新：Linux游戏性能新时代

priority.full_text:
見かけた対策：

①「“”」で出てこない場合は代わりに「%22」で囲う
例：%22検索したい文%22

②少しマシ程度の改善だが日付指定する
例：since:開始日 until:終了日

③諦めてYahooリアルタイム検索を使う

④諦めてClaude Code使う（便利だけど有料）

⑤イーロンを縛り付ける

priority.full_text:
1. Gemini (solve any problem)
2. Perplexity (research anything)
3. Klingai (create AI videos)
4. Luma (create 3D models)
5. Suno (compose music)
6. Hemingwayapp (perfect writing)
7. Capcut (edit videos)
8. Youlearn (summarize YouTube)
9. Canva (design graphics)
10. ElevenLabs
